## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aftershoot and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO, and product-led growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/UmSLsBcCRaM8HyYLztxzhPfECZAAEfT3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Nico to specialize in product-led blog posts; Team GrowthX to focus on SEO and WordPress publishing](https://fathom.video/share/UmSLsBcCRaM8HyYLztxzhPfECZAAEfT3?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [New product demo process implemented to improve content creators' understanding of Aftershoot](https://fathom.video/share/UmSLsBcCRaM8HyYLztxzhPfECZAAEfT3?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Looker Studio dashboard for content performance tracking to be available next week](https://fathom.video/share/UmSLsBcCRaM8HyYLztxzhPfECZAAEfT3?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Plans to develop industry-specific and feature-focused pages using proprietary data and keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/UmSLsBcCRaM8HyYLztxzhPfECZAAEfT3?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)

## Topics

  - [SEO articles published: mirrorless cameras, photography business income](https://fathom.video/share/UmSLsBcCRaM8HyYLztxzhPfECZAAEfT3?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
